raw_response:
```python
expected = metadata.get("expected_phase_bitstring", "101011")
n = metadata.get("counting_qubits", 6)

expected_int = int(expected, 2)
neighbors = {
    format(expected_int, f"0{n}b"),
    format((expected_int - 1) % (2**n), f"0{n}b"),
    format((expected_int + 1) % (2**n), f"0{n}b"),
}

total_counts = sum(counts.values())
assert total_counts == shots, (total_counts, shots)

expected_count = counts.get(expected, 0)
neighbor_mass = sum(counts.get(bitstring, 0) for bitstring in neighbors)
max_key = max(counts, key=counts.get)

assert max_key in neighbors, (max_key, neighbors, counts)
assert expected_count >= 0.35 * shots, (expected, expected_count, shots)
assert neighbor_mass >= 0.80 * shots, (neighbors, neighbor_mass, shots)
```

```python
expected = metadata.get("expected_phase_bitstring", "101011")
n = metadata.get("counting_qubits", 6)

expected_int = int(expected, 2)
neighbors = {
    format((expected_int - 1) % (2**n), f"0{n}b"),
    expected,
    format((expected_int + 1) % (2**n), f"0{n}b"),
}

total_counts = sum(counts.values())
assert total_counts == shots, (total_counts, shots)

peak_bitstring = max(counts, key=counts.get)
assert peak_bitstring in neighbors, (peak_bitstring, neighbors)

neighbor_weight = sum(counts.get(bit, 0) for bit in neighbors)
expected_weight = counts.get(expected, 0)

assert expected_weight / shots >= 0.45, counts
assert neighbor_weight / shots >= 0.80, (neighbors, counts)
assert expected_weight == max(counts.values()), counts
```

```python
n = metadata.get("counting_qubits", 6)
expected = metadata.get("expected_phase_bitstring", format(43, f"0{n}b"))
expected_int = int(expected, 2)

total = sum(counts.values())
assert total == shots, f"Counts sum {total} does not match shots {shots}"

peak_bitstring = max(counts, key=counts.get)
peak_int = int(peak_bitstring, 2)

neighbors = {
    format(v, f"0{n}b")
    for v in (expected_int - 1, expected_int, expected_int + 1)
    if 0 <= v < 2**n
}
neighbor_mass = sum(counts.get(b, 0) for b in neighbors)
expected_count = counts.get(expected, 0)

assert peak_bitstring in neighbors, (
    f"Peak outcome {peak_bitstring} not in expected neighborhood {sorted(neighbors)}"
)
assert expected_count >= 0.2 * shots, (
    f"Expected bitstring {expected} has too little weight: {expected_count}/{shots}"
)
assert neighbor_mass >= 0.8 * shots, (
    f"Expected neighborhood {sorted(neighbors)} has insufficient mass: {neighbor_mass}/{shots}"
)
```

```python
n = metadata.get("counting_qubits", 6)
expected = metadata.get("expected_phase_bitstring", format(43, "06b"))
expected_int = int(expected, 2)

total_counts = sum(counts.values())
assert total_counts == shots, f"Counts sum {total_counts} does not match shots {shots}"

main = counts.get(expected, 0)
left = counts.get(format(expected_int - 1, f"0{n}b"), 0) if expected_int > 0 else 0
right = counts.get(format(expected_int + 1, f"0{n}b"), 0) if expected_int < (2**n - 1) else 0
neighborhood = main + left + right

top_bitstring = max(counts, key=counts.get)
assert top_bitstring == expected, f"Most frequent outcome {top_bitstring} != expected {expected}"
assert main / shots >= 0.45, f"Expected bitstring probability too low: {main}/{shots}"
assert neighborhood / shots >= 0.8, f"Expected neighborhood concentration too low: {neighborhood}/{shots}"
assert neighborhood >= sum(v for k, v in counts.items() if k not in {expected, format(expected_int - 1, f'0{n}b') if expected_int > 0 else None, format(expected_int + 1, f'0{n}b') if expected_int < (2**n - 1) else None}), "Distribution is not concentrated near the expected bitstring"
```

```python
expected = metadata.get("expected_phase_bitstring", "101011")
n = metadata.get("counting_qubits", 6)
expected_int = int(expected, 2)

total_counts = sum(counts.values())
assert total_counts == shots, f"Counts sum {total_counts} does not match shots {shots}"

peak_bitstring = max(counts, key=counts.get)
peak_int = int(peak_bitstring, 2)

neighbor_keys = {
    format(i, f"0{n}b")
    for i in (expected_int - 1, expected_int, expected_int + 1)
    if 0 <= i < 2**n
}

neighbor_mass = sum(counts.get(k, 0) for k in neighbor_keys)
expected_count = counts.get(expected, 0)

assert abs(peak_int - expected_int) <= 1, (
    f"Peak outcome {peak_bitstring} is not at the expected bitstring {expected} or its immediate neighbors"
)
assert expected_count >= 0.25 * shots, (
    f"Expected bitstring {expected} has too little weight: {expected_count}/{shots}"
)
assert neighbor_mass >= 0.8 * shots, (
    f"Distribution is not sufficiently concentrated near {expected}: neighborhood mass {neighbor_mass}/{shots}"
)
```

```python
expected = metadata.get("expected_phase_bitstring", "101011")

}
```

```python
n = metadata.get("counting_qubits", 6)
expected = metadata.get("expected_phase_bitstring", "101011")
expected_int = int(expected, 2)

total_counts = sum(counts.values())
assert total_counts == shots, f"Counts sum {total_counts} does not match shots {shots}"

main = counts.get(expected, 0)
left = counts.get(format((expected_int - 1) % (2**n), f"0{n}b"), 0)
right = counts.get(format((expected_int + 1) % (2**n), f"0{n}b"), 0)
neighbor_mass = main + left + right

assert main > 0, f"Expected peak bitstring {expected} not observed"
assert main >= left and main >= right, (
    f"Expected bitstring {expected} is not the dominant point within its neighborhood"
)
assert neighbor_mass >= 0.8 * shots, (
    f"Distribution is not sufficiently concentrated near {expected}: "
    f"{neighbor_mass}/{shots} in expected bitstring and immediate neighbors"
)

outside_mass = shots - neighbor_mass
assert outside_mass <= 0.2 * shots, (
    f"Too much probability mass lies outside the expected neighborhood: {outside_mass}/{shots}"
)
```

```python
counting_qubits = metadata.get("counting_qubits", 6)
expected = metadata.get("expected_phase_bitstring", "101011")
expected_int = int(expected, 2)

total_counts = sum(counts.values())
assert total_counts == shots, f"Counts sum {total_counts} != shots {shots}"

peak = max(counts, key=counts.get)
assert peak == expected, f"Peak outcome {peak} != expected {expected}"

neighbors = {
    format((expected_int - 1) % (2 ** counting_qubits), f"0{counting_qubits}b"),
    expected,
    format((expected_int + 1) % (2 ** counting_qubits), f"0{counting_qubits}b"),
}
neighbor_counts = sum(counts.get(bitstr, 0) for bitstr in neighbors)

assert counts.get(expected, 0) / shots >= 0.5, (
    f"Expected bitstring {expected} has insufficient weight: {counts.get(expected, 0)}/{shots}"
)
assert neighbor_counts / shots >= 0.8, (
    f"Expected bitstring and immediate neighbors have insufficient concentration: {neighbor_counts}/{shots}"
)
```

```python
n = metadata.get("counting_qubits", 6)
expected = metadata.get("expected_phase_bitstring", "101011")
expected_int = int(expected, 2)

total_counts = sum(counts.values())
assert total_counts == shots, (total_counts, shots)

peak_count = counts.get(expected, 0)
left = format(expected_int - 1, f"0{n}b") if expected_int > 0 else None
right = format(expected_int + 1, f"0{n}b") if expected_int < (2**n - 1) else None
neighbor_count = peak_count
if left is not None:
    neighbor_count += counts.get(left, 0)
if right is not None:
    neighbor_count += counts.get(right, 0)

assert peak_count > 0, counts
assert peak_count / shots >= 0.45, counts
assert neighbor_count / shots >= 0.80, counts

max_other = max(v for k, v in counts.items() if k != expected) if any(k != expected for k in counts) else 0
assert peak_count >= max_other, counts
```

```python
expected = metadata.get("expected_phase_bitstring", "101011")
n = metadata.get("counting_qubits", 6)

expected_int = int(expected, 2)
neighbors = {format(v, "0{}b".format(n)) for v in (expected_int - 1, expected_int, expected_int + 1) if 0 <= v < 2**n}

total_counts = sum(counts.values())
assert total_counts == shots, (total_counts, shots)

expected_count = counts.get(expected, 0)
neighbor_count = sum(counts.get(b, 0) for b in neighbors)

assert expected in counts, counts
assert expected_count / shots >= 0.5, (expected, expected_count, shots, counts)
assert neighbor_count / shots >= 0.9, (neighbors, neighbor_count, shots, counts)

max_bitstring = max(counts, key=counts.get)
assert max_bitstring in neighbors, (max_bitstring, neighbors, counts)
```

```python
n = metadata.get("counting_qubits", 6)
expected = metadata.get("expected_phase_bitstring", "101011")
expected_int = int(expected, 2)

total_counts = sum(counts.values())
assert total_counts == shots, (total_counts, shots)

main = counts.get(expected, 0)
left = counts.get(format((expected_int - 1) % (2**n), f"0{n}b"), 0)
right = counts.get(format((expected_int + 1) % (2**n), f"0{n}b"), 0)

peak_key = max(counts, key=counts.get)
assert peak_key == expected, (peak_key, expected, counts)

neighbor_mass = main + left + right
assert main / shots >= 0.55, (main, shots, counts)
assert neighbor_mass / shots >= 0.90, (neighbor_mass, shots, counts)
assert all(v <= main for k, v in counts.items() if k != expected), counts
```

```python
expected = metadata.get("expected_phase_bitstring", "101011")
n = metadata.get("counting_qubits", 6)
expected_int = int(expected, 2)

total = sum(counts.values())
assert total == shots, f"Counts total {total} does not match shots {shots}"

peak = max(counts, key=counts.get)
assert peak == expected, f"Peak outcome {peak} != expected {expected}"

neighbors = {
    format((expected_int - 1) % (2 ** n), f"0{n}b"),
    expected,
    format((expected_int + 1) % (2 ** n), f"0{n}b"),
}
neighbor_mass = sum(counts.get(b, 0) for b in neighbors)
expected_mass = counts.get(expected, 0)

assert expected_mass / shots >= 0.5, (
    f"Expected bitstring {expected} has too little weight: {expected_mass}/{shots}"
)
assert neighbor_mass / shots >= 0.85, (
    f"Distribution not concentrated on expected bitstring and immediate neighbors: "
    f"{neighbor_mass}/{shots}"
)
```
